REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, RIGO AS TO DEFENDANT SOLIS, EDITH , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF REYES, RIGO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, RIGO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLIS, EDITH , AN INDIVIDUAL $6,823.40 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,823.40, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, RIGO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLIS, EDITH , AN INDIVIDUAL $3,201.83 PRINCIPAL, $21.78 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,428.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
